data.name: Hero_Subtitle
data.value: Pick the recommended cleanup set or choose tasks one by one. Every card explains what it removes, how safe it is, and which advanced actions deserve more caution.

data.name: Preset_Recommended_Description
data.value: Uses the safe default set for daily cleanup. Good for friends and family who just want more free space.

data.name: Preset_Advanced_Description
data.value: Turns on every task, including cache resets and DISM maintenance. Review warnings before you run it.

data.name: Summary_Risk_Safe
data.value: Current risk level: Safe. This selection only targets everyday caches and temporary files.

data.name: Summary_Risk_Review
data.value: Current risk level: Review. This selection includes system caches that may take Windows a moment to rebuild.

data.name: Summary_Risk_Advanced
data.value: Current risk level: Advanced. Review warnings carefully before running these tasks.

data.name: Summary_Guide_Default
data.value: Select a preset or toggle individual cards. Nothing outside the selected tasks will be touched.

data.name: Summary_Guide_Selected
data.value: The selected items below will be cleaned in one run with administrator access.

data.name: Summary_Untouched
data.value: Unselected items stay untouched. You can always inspect the log folder after a run.

data.name: Update_NotConfigured
data.value: Automatic updates are not configured yet.

data.name: Update_NotInstalled
data.value: Updates become active after installing the packaged release.

data.name: Update_UpToDate
data.value: You are on the latest installed version.

data.name: Result_Empty
data.value: No cleanup has been run yet.

data.name: Result_Waiting
data.value: Your next cleanup summary will appear here.

data.name: Result_Running
data.value: TemizPC is deleting the selected temporary data and collecting a summary.

data.name: Result_Summary
data.value: Freed {0}, removed {1} items, skipped {2} locked or protected entries.

data.name: Task_Recent_Description
data.value: Clears Windows' recent-file shortcuts so file history lists look clean again.

data.name: Task_WindowsTemp_Description
data.value: Deletes files from C:\Windows\Temp that are no longer in use.

data.name: Task_LocalTemp_Description
data.value: Deletes temporary files created by apps in your local profile.

data.name: Task_RecycleBin_Description
data.value: Empties the Recycle Bin to reclaim space from files you already deleted.

data.name: Task_ThumbnailCache_Description
data.value: Removes cached thumbnail and icon previews so Windows can rebuild them cleanly.

data.name: Task_WindowsErrorReports_Description
data.value: Deletes archived crash and error reporting files collected by Windows.

data.name: Task_DeliveryOptimization_Description
data.value: Clears cached Windows update delivery files that are no longer needed.

data.name: Task_Prefetch_Description
data.value: Deletes Windows prefetch data. Windows will rebuild it over time.

data.name: Task_Prefetch_Warning
data.value: Advanced: apps may feel slightly slower the next few launches while Windows rebuilds this cache.

data.name: Task_WindowsUpdateCache_Description
data.value: Removes downloaded Windows Update packages stored for reuse.

data.name: Task_WindowsUpdateCache_Warning
data.value: Review: if Windows is currently updating, some files will be skipped until the process is complete.

data.name: Task_CrashDumps_Description
data.value: Deletes memory dump and application crash dump files created for diagnostics.

data.name: Task_Dism_Description
data.value: Runs DISM StartComponentCleanup to remove outdated component store data.

data.name: Task_Dism_Warning
data.value: Advanced: this can take a while and should not be interrupted once it starts.
